name: ARILResetPDUTimingCyclic
title: ARILResetPDUTimingCyclic
description: Resets the cyclic-timing to the values from the database. Possibly two timings (False and True) exist in parallel and are selected upon the current transmission mode of the PDU.

parameters.name: dbMessage
parameters.description: The symbolic name of a PDU in the database.
